title: Inside Buffalo
overview: The story of the 92nd Buffalo Division, the exclusively African American segregated combat unit which fought against nazism with outstanding heroism in Italy during the Second World War.

trailers.title: "INSIDE BUFFALO" (They served America when America was not ready to serve them) by Fred Kuwornu
